evals.name: ethical-launch-email
evals.prompt: Write a launch email for a limited beta with real capacity constraints, credible proof, and a clear CTA. Avoid fake urgency and fake social proof.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: nonprofit-donation-page
evals.prompt: Improve this nonprofit donation page without guilt, fake matching, or fake scarcity. Keep it persuasive and evidence-based.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
